title: Integration test: collision and capture effect
description: Test: three nodes A, B, C. A and B transmit simultaneously to C. Case 1: equal power, both lost. Case 2: A is 10dB stronger, A wins (capture effect). Case 3: A is 4dB stronger, both lost (below 6dB threshold). Verify packet delivery matches expected behavior.
close_reason: Integration tests added to test_integration.py: collision/capture (3 tests), mobility (3 tests), chaos monkey (3 tests).
